name: memex-codex
description: Search and save content in your Memex library through the hosted Memex MCP server and bundled memex-agent-skill.

interface.shortDescription: Search and save content from your Memex library in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the hosted Memex MCP server so it can search saved content and save public URLs with the bundled memex-agent-skill.
defaultPrompt: Search my Memex library for notes on vector databases.
Save this URL into Memex and summarize related notes.
Find saved highlights about MCP authentication in Memex.
